positive: A highly detailed, central composition featuring a luminous mystical forest scene at twilight. The main subject is a gracefully intertwined branch of bioluminescent flora and delicate glowing mushrooms, framing a stylized celestial body (like a crescent moon or distant nebula). The style is Neo-Art Nouveau mixed with highly saturated fantasy illustration, emphasizing strong, clean silhouettes and high contrast. Use deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and pops of glowing gold and lavender for accent lighting. The composition must be suitable for a center-chest apparel print, maintaining vector-like sharpness and intricate line work. Studio lighting, dramatic backlighting, UHD, ornamental, symmetrical balance, negative space utilized for crisp printing.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, signature, dirty, grunge, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, solid color, plain, sketch, photorealistic, out of focus
